Riverview Home Loans

FHA loans in Riverview, Florida

Riverview is one of the Tampa area's fastest-growing communities, with master-planned neighborhoods like Panther Trace and Boyette and a steady stream of new construction. Its blend of affordability, new homes, and an easy commute to Tampa makes it a prime FHA market — the statewide loan limit covers most homes, and new construction sails through the FHA appraisal.

Hillsborough County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Riverview

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Riverview home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Riverview's new-construction-heavy market, that covers the vast majority of homes. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Hillsborough County's exact figure with HUD.

FHA and new construction in fast-growing Riverview

Riverview is practically tailor-made for FHA buyers: modern homes that meet FHA standards, prices within the loan limit, and a flood of families and Tampa commuters. It's ideal for first-time buyers. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds, and get pre-approved first so your offer is ready in a competitive area.

Down payment help for Riverview buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Riverview buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Hillsborough County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Riverview

We help buyers throughout Riverview and Hillsborough County, including Panther Trace, Boyette, and Summerfield. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Riverview (Hillsborough County) for 2026?+
Hillsborough County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all Riverview homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Riverview good for FHA buyers?+
Very — its abundant new construction at prices within the FHA limit makes it one of the Tampa area's friendliest FHA markets.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Riverview?+
Yes — newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Riverview?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Hillsborough County?+
Yes — Riverview, Brandon, Tampa, and surrounding communities.
